title_en: Final Biographies, Questions, and Closing Conversation
petrov_stage: Collapse the whole course into biography, follow-up questions, and closing dialogue.
petrov_mission: Give a short biography, ask one follow-up question, and close with a social formula or toast.
focus_targets: Final biography mode chains simple clauses
Question exchange uses 有问题吗 and live follow-ups
为什么 ... 因为 ... remains the compact reasoning pair
Experience uses 去过 plus frequency counting

listening_tasks.prompt: Listen for one of these lesson anchors and identify the intent: 你们好, 你们今天都很美, 问题, 你们有问题吗？.
Listen to a line that uses Final biography mode chains simple clauses and Question exchange uses 有问题吗 and live follow-ups and repeat the key detail correctly.

reading_tasks.prompt: Match these lesson items to their meanings: 你们好, 你们今天都很美, 问题, 你们有问题吗？.
Rebuild one short sentence that uses Final biography mode chains simple clauses with one lesson vocabulary item.

speaking_tasks.prompt: Give a short biography, ask one follow-up question, and close with a social formula or toast.
Repeat the opening greeting and compliment as one smooth teacher chunk.

rapid_recall: Recall and say: 你们好, 你们今天都很美, 问题, 你们有问题吗？, 颜色.
Which lesson-16 pair means why and because?
Translate into Chinese: What is your dog's name?
mock_pass_criteria: Uses at least two of these lesson anchors correctly: 你们好, 你们今天都很美, 问题.
Produces one correct spoken line using Final biography mode chains simple clauses.
Answers one follow-up without dropping completely out of Chinese.
